# SIS Epidemic Model

Two-compartment model with recovery but no lasting immunity:
\$\$\frac{dS}{dt} = -\beta S I + \gamma I\$\$ \$\$\frac{dI}{dt} = \beta
S I - \gamma I\$\$

## Usage

``` r
model_sis(init, params, times, ...)
```

## Arguments

- init:

  Named numeric vector, e.g. `c(S = 990, I = 10)`.

- params:

  Named numeric vector, e.g. `c(beta = 0.002, gamma = 0.1)`.

  beta

  :   Transmission rate.

  gamma

  :   Recovery rate (1/gamma = mean infectious period).

- times:

  Numeric vector of output times.

- ...:

  Additional arguments passed to `ode_solver`.

## Value

A `data.frame` with columns `time`, `S`, `I`.

## Details

Population size \\N = S + I\\ is conserved.

## Examples

``` r
model_sis(
  init   = c(S = 990, I = 10),
  params = c(beta = 0.002, gamma = 0.1),
  times  = seq(0, 50, by = 0.1)
)
#>     time         S         I
#> 1    0.0 990.00000  10.00000
#> 2    0.1 987.93408  12.06592
#> 3    0.2 985.44796  14.55204
#> 4    0.3 982.45918  17.54082
```
